building_categories.description: Housing buildings including apartments, condos, townhouses, and senior living facilities
Retail stores, restaurants, shopping centers, and consumer-facing businesses
Professional workspaces including office buildings, corporate headquarters, and coworking spaces
Warehouses, manufacturing facilities, data centers, and storage facilities
Essential city infrastructure including parking, transit stations, and transportation hubs
Healthcare facilities including hospitals, clinics, dental offices, and veterinary clinics
Schools, colleges, daycares, and other educational institutions
Government services including libraries, community centers, fire stations, and police stations
Municipal and county government buildings including city hall and courthouses
Hotels, motels, and lodging establishments from budget to luxury
Venues for recreation and entertainment including theaters, sports arenas, and nightclubs
Places of worship including churches, mosques, synagogues, and temples

item_categories.description: Objects that can be used to cause harm
Instruments or devices used to perform tasks
Written or printed records and paperwork
Items that are used up or consumed
Critical items required to advance the story
Hints or pieces of information that help solve a case
Material or information that establishes facts in a case
Systematic inquiry or examination to uncover facts
Close observation of a person, place, or activity
Miscellaneous items that do not fit other categories

evidence_categories.description: Tangible objects or materials collected from a scene
Written records, contracts, letters, or printed documents
Electronic data, files, emails, or digital media
Statements or accounts provided by witnesses or persons of interest
Scientific analysis results such as fingerprints, DNA, or ballistics
